sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n4151" key="a)liba/nwtos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀλῐβάνωτος</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ᾰν], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype></foreign>, <sense id="n4151.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">not honoured with incense</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0497.tlg001:113" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Pl.Com.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">113</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
